overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural village at night, transitioning to open countryside with a windmill and sunflower fields. The scene features clear night skies with moonlight illuminating the traditional wooden architecture and natural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts path between wooden fences

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path between wooden fences and village houses

entered.detail: weathered wooden picket fences lining both sides of the path
traditional wooden cottage with thatched roof and lit windows
wooden post with burning flame providing warm orange light
trees with white spring blossoms visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow village path at night, bordered by wooden fences and traditional cottages. Moonlight filters through blossoming trees while a torch post provides warm illumination ahead. Geralt walks steadily forward through this quiet rural setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: village boundary with stone stairs and wooden bridge

events.description: ascending stone stairs leading up from the village path
exiting the village enclosure into open countryside with ruins

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs and passing a peasant working near the path

notable_agents.action: peasant farmer working with a tool near the fence line

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward from the village
simple wooden footbridge crossing a small depression
crumbling stone walls of abandoned structures in the field
tall wooden windmill with rotating blades silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the village proper, ascending stone stairs past a working peasant. The environment opens up to reveal open fields with ancient stone ruins and a distant windmill becoming visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farmland with windmill and scattered ruins

events.description: windmill becomes prominent as the character approaches
passing the windmill on the left side

agents.ego_description: traversing open fields toward and past the windmill structure

entered.detail: tall dark silhouette of a distant castle or fortified building

segments.scene_description: The character moves through wide open farmland, passing stone ruins and approaching a large wooden windmill. After passing the windmill, the landscape opens further with distant towers visible on the horizon under the starry night sky.

events.description: entering a field of tall sunflowers on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through tall vegetation toward distant village buildings

entered.detail: tall yellow sunflowers lining the left side of the dirt path
cluster of buildings with lit windows visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt walking through open countryside with tall sunflowers blooming on the left. The windmill is now behind, and the path leads toward a distant village with glowing windows visible on the horizon, maintaining the quiet nocturnal atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate confines of a moonlit village into the expansive openness of the nocturnal countryside. It begins on a narrow path bordered by wooden fences and blossoming trees, where warm torchlight guides the way through a quiet cluster of cottages. As the camera ascends stone stairs past a peasant, the village architecture gives way to wide farmland featuring ancient stone ruins and a distant windmill silhouetted against the starry sky. The scene then expands further as the camera passes the wooden windmill, revealing distant towers on the horizon before turning toward a path lined with blooming sunflowers. Finally, the landscape opens completely, leading the way toward a far-off village with glowing windows shimmering under the clear night sky.
